label: Observability, tracing & evaluation harnesses

node.label: Observability, tracing & evaluation harnesses
node.definition: Observability and evaluation harnesses record prompts, traces, tokens, latency, costs, tool calls, outcomes, regressions, and safety signals.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Observability, tracing & evaluation harnesses is to connect Reproducibility, drift & continuous monitoring, Benchmarks, test suites & task metrics to downstream capabilities including Autonomous software-engineering agents, Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence, Verified and assurance-gated agents.
examples: substrate for Multi-agent systems & organizational intelligence
substrate for Verified and assurance-gated agents
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Reproducibility, drift & continuous monitoring, Benchmarks, test suites & task metrics.

dependencies.rationale: Observability, tracing & evaluation harnesses turns Reproducibility, drift & continuous monitoring into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Observability, tracing & evaluation harnesses turns Benchmarks, test suites & task metrics into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Observability, tracing & evaluation harnesses turns Model servers & inference runtimes into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Observability, tracing & evaluation harnesses turns Content credentials, signing & provenance into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Observability, tracing & evaluation harnesses turns LLM-as-judge & automated critique into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Observability, tracing & evaluation harnesses turns Mechanistic interpretability & circuit analysis into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Observability, tracing & evaluation harnesses turns Evaluation-driven development & release gates into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
